headline: Backend Engineer II at Stripe | Ex-Notion, Figma | UC Berkeley Alum

location.linkedinText: San Francisco Bay Area, United States

parsed.text: San Francisco Bay Area, United States

about: Backend Engineer specialized in designing and building high-throughput APIs, distributed transaction pipelines, and real-time collaboration backends using event sourcing and CRDT principles.

experience.description:
Architected and deployed a distributed transaction reconciliation service in Go, reducing settlement discrepancies by 98.7%.
Optimized ledger database queries implementing strategic query caching, reducing P99 latency to 120ms.
Led migration of billing pipeline routing microservice to containerized Go service on Kubernetes.

Built and maintained 8 core APIs serving 15M+ monthly active users with 99.94% uptime SLA.
Designed real-time collaborative editing backend using event sourcing and CRDT principles enabling simultaneous edits with <200ms sync latency.
Implemented Redis-based rate limiting system protecting critical workspace APIs from abuse.

Developed asynchronous file processing pipeline using Python and Celery, decreasing average export times to 2.1 seconds.
Implemented Redis-based design component metadata cache layer improving response times by 61%.
Contributed to PostgreSQL database schema indexing optimization.
